## Properties

| Property     | Attribute    | Description                                                                         | Type                       | Default     |
| ------------ | ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | ----------- |
| `color`      | `color`      | The color variant of the progress bar. Options: - 'primary' (default) - 'secondary' | `"primary" \| "secondary"` | `'primary'` |
